title: 3M: Building an HPC Modeling Platform to Simplify AWS Usage for Scientists and Engineers

description:
In this episode of This Is My Architecture, you'll learn how 3M built an high-performance computing (HPC) modeling platform on AWS. 3M's solution makes it easy for their scientists and engineers to use AWS to publish, discover, and run their physics-based and machine learning-based models on AWS. You'll learn how they built a secure single-page web application for HPC model publishing and discovery with Amazon CloudFront, Amazon API Gateway, Amazon DynamoDB, and Amazon S3. You'll also see how they leverage AWS Step Functions and AWS Lambda to provide a CI/CD system for model publishing. Lastly, you'll see how they use Amazon EC2 to build HPC clusters that run the models on demand.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: 3M: Building an HPC Modeling Platform to Simplify AWS Usage for Scientists and Engineers
